tasks.task: Audit current Mac hardware for Ornith 397B feasibility
evidence: MacBookPro18,2 Apple M1 Max, 10 CPU cores, 32 GPU cores
swap observed at 9241.88 MB used of 10240 MB
tasks.result: Full local Ornith 397B rejected before download.
tasks.next_action: Only revisit local full-model deployment if attached compute or memory capacity changes materially.

evidence: official serving recipe targets a single 8x80 GB GPU node using vLLM or SGLang
tasks.result: Remote 8x80 GB GPU deployment is the realistic full-model path.
tasks.next_action: Request approval before provisioning, purchasing, or exposing a remote endpoint.

tasks.task: Preserve existing local AI production lane
evidence: Existing routing policy keeps oMLX on http://127.0.0.1:18080/v1 as default front door
No application provider config was changed because no Ornith endpoint has passed activation gates
tasks.result: Ornith documented as candidate only; production remains oMLX/Gemma.
tasks.next_action: Validate current oMLX health after documentation/config updates.

evidence: No approved remote GPU host, API key, Tailscale route, TLS endpoint, or spend boundary was provided.
tasks.blocker: Material cost and credentials require explicit user approval.
tasks.next_action: After approval, provision vLLM or SGLang on 8x80 GB-class GPU capacity and run activation gates before tool rewiring.

evidence: No official smaller Ornith GGUF or MLX candidate was downloaded in this pass.
tasks.blocker: Requires separate candidate discovery and controlled download/benchmark window.
tasks.next_action: Search official model repositories for 35B, 31B, and 9B variants, then test only candidates with verified MLX or GGUF support.
